target.name: GTPase KRas
target.role_in_tme: Primary oncogenic driver — G12D mutation prevents GTP hydrolysis
target.ome_relevance: All tumor cells express KRAS G12D; downstream MAPK/PI3K drives proliferation
target.pocket: Switch-II pocket (GDP state), Asp12 covalent site (GTP state)
target.sprint_relevance: Dominant in all 65+ runs; Opus repeatedly identifies as primary node

target.name: Vascular endothelial growth factor A
target.ome_relevance: VEGF:IFN-γ ratio >10:1 in COLD avatar; Phenomenon #15: 58:1 in HOT avatar
target.sprint_relevance: VEGF dominant cytokine in all Haiku runs; VEGF:IFN-γ ratio key TME metric Sprint 7B

target.name: Interleukin-6
target.role_in_tme: M2 macrophage polarization, NK cell suppression, DC tolerization
target.ome_relevance: m2_polarisation_threshold directly derived from IL6 z-score in zAvatar

target.name: Programmed death-ligand 1 (PD-L1)
target.role_in_tme: CD8+ T cell exhaustion via PD-1 checkpoint engagement
target.ome_relevance: CD274 z-score determines exhaustion_age in zAvatar; COLD has lowest exhaustion_age
target.sprint_relevance: NK exhaustion c25 and CD8+ exhaustion c31 mechanistically linked to PD-L1

target.name: Interleukin-6 receptor subunit alpha
target.role_in_tme: Signal transducer for IL-6; activates JAK1/STAT3 in tumor cells
target.ome_relevance: KRAS G12D tumors overexpress IL6R; creates autocrine IL-6 loop
target.sprint_relevance: Opus analyses consistently identify IL-6/VEGF axis as TME immunosuppression driver
